title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the some values, Save EQ, dialog present, click OK
scenario: Custom EQ values are not saved after clicking OK in the save confirmation dialog
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust some frequency band sliders (e.g., increase or decrease values)
expected: The Custom EQ settings are saved, the dialog is dismissed, and the new EQ values are applied to the audio output.
